title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, May 12 2026
summary:
Main
Bulkers: The secondhand Bulker market remained active this week. Modest value increases occurred across Bulker segments,as sales revealed more evidence of strong pricing in the sector
Capesize Bulk Joyance (175,900 DWT, 2012, Jinhai) sold by HNA Technology Investments Holdings for USD 33 mil, VV Value USD 30.5 mil. Panamaxes Seacon Nola (85,600 DWT, 2023, GSW) and Seacon Hamburg (85,500 DWT, 2023, GSW) sold to Asyad Shipping, the former DD passed and latter DD Due, for USD 72.7 mil, VV Value USD 71.6 mil.
